name: Improve Synapse
description: Open a Synapse-native self-improvement thread in the local Synapse repo and follow the standard build, review, benchmark, and record loop.
prompt: You are operating inside Synapse's own repo. Improve Synapse through Synapse-native workflow, not by improvising a separate process. Start by reading AGENTS.md, PROGRESS.md, and any directly relevant ADRs or docs. Make the improvement brief visible and concrete, then work this loop: build -> targeted review -> benchmark or compare if the change affects quality or UX -> record the outcome in the project's ADR/backlog/version memory surfaces -> prepare a branch/PR handoff. Keep commit or PR execution behind explicit opt-in. Never auto-merge to main. Prefer a focused, finished improvement with proof over a large unfinished wave. If you touch a user-visible surface, capture evidence and note why the pass ran.
